_readme: Set active=true to enable a client. Set active=false to pause without deleting. Mode: automated or draft_approval.

clients._comment: PT Tampa Bay Test Campaign — vito@argusreach.com inbox, draft_approval mode
clients.title: Founder
clients.icp_summary: Independent PT clinic owners in Tampa Bay area. We are reaching out to offer physician referral outreach services - identifying PCPs, orthos, and sports med docs in their market and managing outreach on their behalf.
clients.compliance_note: Do not make any clinical claims, do not promise specific referral numbers or revenue outcomes, do not discuss insurance reimbursement rates
clients.positioning_note: ArgusReach is a tool that helps clinic owners make more sales and build physician networks - we are not replacing their sales efforts or relationships. We identify the right doctors and manage outreach on their behalf so they can focus on patient care. Emphasize partnership and amplification, not replacement.
